concerns.analysis: The source document contains a meaningful agency logo on the first page, which is missing from the HTML output (it was converted to a text placeholder instead of an image tag). Furthermore, the image manifest indicates that the images present in the HTML (the signature on page 3 and the footer text image on page 2) are corrupt (`"valid": false`) due to a missing library error, meaning they will not render properly in a browser.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Seal of the North Carolina Marine Fisheries logo at the top left of page 1, and the handwritten signature of Kathy B. Rawls on page 3.
concerns.output_quote:
[Image: Seal of the North Carolina Marine Fisheries featuring a fish over an outline of the state]

(Missing img tag), and Image Manifest showing "valid": false for the signature image.

concerns.analysis: The source document contains a continuous list at the root level using Roman numerals (I through X), with some items containing alphabetical sub-lists. On page 1, items I through VI are correctly extracted as an ordered list. However, starting on page 2, the pipeline extracts items VII, VIII, IX, and X as headings (h2 and h3) rather than list items, severing them from the main list structure. The alphabetical sub-lists under these items are then extracted as separate, new ordered lists. This com
concerns.source_pdf_quote:
VII. PENDER COUNTY
A. That area 100 feet...
... 
VIII. NEW HANOVER COUNTY
... 
IX. BRUNSWICK COUNTY 
... 
X. GENERAL INFORMATION

concerns.description: Link text pulled over but not hyperlinked
concerns.analysis: Multiple clickable hyperlinks in the source PDF were pulled into the output list items as plain flat text, missing the markdown link formatting that would render them as active inline hyperlinks. Examples include 'NCDMF Interactive Map', 'latest proclamation', and 'PT-1-2024'.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: For more information about designated nursery areas visit the NCDMF Interactive Map.
concerns.output_quote: For more information about designated nursery areas visit the NCDMF Interactive Map.

concerns.description: Displaced hyperlinks: 4 link(s) extracted as standalone elements instead of inline text
concerns.analysis: standalone_links=4, examples=['https://ncdenr.maps.arcgis.com/home/webmap/viewer.html?useEx', 'https://deq.nc.gov/about/divisions/marine-fisheries/rules-pr', 'https://files.nc.gov/deq/documents/2023-12/PT-1-2024%20Amend']. Links should be inline within paragraphs, not separate blocks.

concerns.description:
Header/footer elements retained in output (3): State of North Carolina | Division of Marine Fisheries
3441 ; Proclamation PT-2-2024
Pg. 2; Proclamation PT-2-2024
Pg. 3
concerns.analysis: header_footer_count=3. Header/footer text from extraction JSON is present in the rendered HTML — the renderer failed to strip it. This is a structural accessibility issue.
The source document heavily uses underlined text to denote locations, channels, and full paragraph sections (e.g., Section X, Item K). These underlines are completely lost in the output.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: K. This proclamation describes areas open to crab, eel, fish, and shrimp pots... unless superseded by another proclamation. (Entire paragraph is bold and underlined in source)
concerns.output_quote: "text": "K. This proclamation describes areas open to crab, eel, fish, and shrimp pots... unless superseded by another proclamation."

concerns.description: 1 bare URL(s) in text not converted to hyperlinks: http://ncmarinefisheries.net.
concerns.analysis: bare_url_count=1. URLs appear as plain text instead of clickable links.
